search.free_search_hint: Senned Enter akken ad tselkmeḍ unadi ilelli

search_actions.transport_desc: Aɣerrabu n usali, takerrust n uɛeddu

auth.login_subtitle: Sekcem inekcamen-ik akken ad tkecmeḍ ɣer umiḍan-ik
auth.forgot_subtitle: Sekcem tansa-k n yimayl akken ad tremseḍ aseɣwen n usali.
auth.email_sent_body_b: tezdi d umiḍan, ad tremseḍ aseɣwen n usali deg kra n tikkal.
auth.reset_subtitle: Fren awal uffir aɣelsan amaynut i umiḍan-ik.
auth.reset_done_body: Aɛiwed n teɣsi ɣer usebter n ukcam itteddu…
auth.reset_invalid_body: Aseɣwen-a n usali ur yelhi neɣ ulac-it kullen. Ssuter wayeḍ.
auth.err_password_min: Awal uffir yessefk ad yesɛu ma drus 8 isekkilen
auth.err_password_upper: Awal uffir yessefk ad yesɛu ma drus 1 asekkil ameqqran
auth.err_password_digit: Awal uffir yessefk ad yesɛu ma drus 1 amḍan

hero.label: Asru n umussu · Lmaɣrib
hero.subtitle: Af tɣawsiwin n umussu ssali-tent ɣer leɛyud yettwasekden deg Lmaɣrib, deg kra n tikkal.

categories_section.label: Tigjda-nneɣ
categories_section.title: Sgun s taggayt
categories_section.subtitle: Tɣawsiwin n umussu i yal aẓray, suddsen s tmusniwt.

featured_section.label: Ifren n yimalas-a
featured_section.title: Imeḥmuyen n Kreli
featured_section.subtitle: Afren-nneɣ deg yiferdisen-nni n yiɣ as turaẓaḍ ugar.

how_it_works.label: Amek iteddu
how_it_works.title: Sali deg 3 yifḍisen
how_it_works.subtitle: Asanaw, yettwaḥrez, ulac tira.
how_it_works.step1_body: Sgun ugar n 5 000 n tɣawsiwin n umussu yellan i usali ɣer tama-k.
how_it_works.step2_body: Aḥraz srid s kra n tnuriwin. Lexlas yettwaḥrez, amesɣen umḍin, asger ittwasaɣen.
how_it_works.step3_body: Awi-it ɣer ubab neɣ rǧu ad ak-d-iyenni. Sgunfu war tira.

cta_section.title: Theggaḍ ad tsalid s umussu?
cta_section.subtitle: Rnu-d ɣer tmendawt n Kreli ass-a.

catalogue.title: Akatalug-nneɣ
catalogue.subtitle: Akk tɣawsiwin yellan i usali
catalogue.no_results_subtitle: Eɛreḍ ad tbeddleḍ imzizdgen neɣ tsegmeḍ tigjda nniḍen.

about.label: Tamacahut-nneɣ
about.intro: Kreli tlul-d seg yiwen n usnirem asanaw: imahalen imaɣriben ttwasdarayen tasrast d tedrimt ssaramen-tent deg unadi, aɣ d aɛiwed n uzenzi n tɣawsiwin ur sseqdacen ara siwa kra n yimalasen. Nesbedd taɣerfa-a akken ur d-iɛawed ara.
about.mission_body_a: Di Lmaɣrib, ulafen n yiferdisen ṭṭsen deg leqyud, ɣas ihennan ad ttnadin srid ɣef tɣawsa nni 20 km ɣef tama-nsen. Kreli tferru asentel-a s usemmedlel n usuq amezgi, yettwaḥrez d wesselken seg yal asawal aẓɣanan.
about.mission_body_b: Mačči d taɣerfa kan i nella. Aɣ d talɣa yellan deffir yal axeddim id-yebdan deg lweqt, yal tedyant id-yebdan war urig, yal axeddim ileḥḥun war asgeɣla n tedrimt.
about.step3: Ḍfer asali deg wakud-nni seg tbult.
about.step4: Remes lexlas amzaray, mebla tagga tameẓzgit.
about.transparent: Tagga tameẓzgit, ulac yiwen n ssur uffir.
about.value_trust_body: Yal bab yettwasekked. Yal asali yettwaḥrez s wemsɣen umḍin d wasger ittwasaɣen.
about.value_speed_body: Seg unadi ɣer usentem deg kra n tikkal. Ulac tira, ulac aṛaǧǧu — tɣawsiwin yellan tura.
about.value_community_body: Imeɣṛasen d leɛyud imaɣriben i d-yefkan laman gar-asen. La nbennu azeḍḍa, mačči kan asuq.
about.value_impact_body: Yal asali yetteddi yegget aẓyad ur nḥwaǧ. Nettallal imahalen ad sxedmen anida i d-yelhan.
about.contact_body: Asumer, taccixt, neɣ kan tebɣiḍ ad ternuḍ ɣer wewra. Tarbaɛt-nneɣ tettarra deg 24 sayɛaten.
about.coverage_body: Nxeddem deg 8 n tudrin imaɣriben nettnerni yal akrad. Ma tudert-ik mazal ur tettwaḥuzz ara, nermes-aɣ-d — tzemreḍ ad tiliḍ d amezwaru deg usuq-ik.

footer.description: Taɣerfa n usali n umussu di Lmaɣrib. Af, sali, ɛeddi-d — war abrid n yixef.

common.error_body: Yella ugellul ur yettwarǧa. Tzemreḍ ad tɛeṛḍeḍ tikkelt-nniḍen neɣ ad tuɣaleḍ ɣer uxxam.
